name: Pima Zinc Corp.
summary: Pima Zinc Corp., an exploration stage company, focuses on evaluating, acquiring, and exploring mineral properties. It holds an agreement to acquire 100% interest in the Pima zinc property that consists of 133 BLM unpatented lode mining claims covering a total area of 2,506 acres located in southern Arizona. Pima Zinc Corp. incorporated in 1916 and is headquartered in Toronto, Canada.
